payload.answer: Weather observations like “Today’s weather is cloudy” are time-sensitive and usually not durable personal memory unless you want to save it for a specific reason.
repair_options: Do not save this as memory.
Save it as a dated note only if you want a record of today’s weather.
Save a more durable preference or pattern instead, if this was meant to indicate something ongoing.
